causalAutopsy.notes: Latent gap since the recovery sentinels were written: RateLimitSentinel + CompactionSentinel keyed recovery on terminal-output staleness with no live-session guard, and never cleared recovery state / unregistered a session on completion. A completed session (no new output) was indistinguishable from a throttled one, so it stayed a recovery target indefinitely. Surfaced fleet-wide via the Mini quota-wall incident (topic 28130, 2026-06-24). Fix moves the invariant to the recovery-ACTION boundary.
